stories.title: "Erano stanchi, non trovando un taxi ad alta quota hanno chiamato il 112. Non si fa così": la rabbia del soccorso alpino del Trentino per le chiamate assurde degli escursionisti in montagna
stories.summary: Le tre richieste della notte: dalla ferrata al taxi mancante a Peio La sequenza di allarmi ha avuto inizio intorno alle 20:30 sulle Dolomiti di Brenta. Due escursionisti stranieri, di ritorno dalla nota ferrata delle Bocchette Centrali, si sono ritrovati bloccati lungo il sentiero Violi, stremati e disidratati. In questo caso, il tecnico di Centrale è riuscito a monitorare e guidare telefonicamente la coppia fino a farle raggiungere in totale autonomia la zona di Vallesinella. Intorno alle 23:00, il centralino ha squillato per una seconda emergenza anomala.

stories.title: Woman, 20s, arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident in Co Monaghan
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

stories.title: Breve tregua dal caldo in Puglia: scatta l'allerta gialla per temporali e vento forte in tutta la regione
stories.summary: Per qualche ora si torna a respirare. Dopo le ondate di calore dei giorni scorsi, la Protezione civile ha diramato un bollettino di allerta gialla per rischio idrogeologico e idrogeologico per temporali, valido dalle 14 di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, fino alla mezzanotte. Oggi sono previste precipitazioni sparse, a prevalente carattere di rovescio o temporale, sulla Puglia centro-settentrionale, con quantitativi cumulati da deboli a puntualmente moderati. Domani invece toccherà alla Puglia meridionale, dove soffieranno venti forti settentrionali con rinforzi fino a burrasca.

stories.title: De Jong sufre una rotura del ligamento lateral interno de la rodilla derecha
stories.summary: El Barcelona confirmó hoy el alcance de la lesión de Frenkie de Jong. El club informó que el centrocampista neerlandés sufre una rotura del ligamento lateral interno de la rodilla derecha y, aunque la entidad no ha determinado el tiempo de baja, estará varias semanas, una noticia que obliga a Hansi Flick a comenzar la temporada sin uno de sus futbolistas más importantes. Eso sí, el internacional no pasará por quirófano. El internacional neerlandés se sometió a nuevas pruebas médicas que permitieron determinar el alcance exacto de la dolencia, después de varios días de exploraciones. Tal y como adelantó MARCA, el mediocentro arrastraba una lesión en la rodilla.

stories.title: Dode na roofoverval op bank in Duitsland, verdachte opgepakt
stories.summary: In de Duitse stad Regensburg is een dode gevallen bij een roofoverval op een bank. De verdachte, een 20-jarige Duitse man, zou het slachtoffer met een mes hebben aangevallen. De politie vermoedde aanvankelijk dat er sprake was van een gijzeling, maar onderzoekt het incident nu als moord en een roofoverval. Het slachtoffer, vermoedelijk een bankmedewerker, wist na het geweld nog naar buiten te vluchten. De man werd met levensbedreigende verwondingen naar het ziekenhuis gebracht. Daar is hij overleden. De dader hield zich ondertussen urenlang op in het gebouw. Hij werd aan het eind van de middag gearresteerd.

stories.title: Darderi debutta a Estoril: il programma su Sky
stories.summary: Torna in campo oggi Luciano Darderi dopo la sconfitta nell'ultima finale dell'Open svedese. L'italoargentino fa il suo debutto nel 250 di Estoril e se la vedrà contro lo spagnolo Pedro Martinez, in diretta su Sky Sport e in streaming su NOW : in palio un posto nei quarti di finale DARDERI-MARTINEZ LIVE In questo giovedì di tennis torna protagonista l'azzurro con un italiano in campo, da seguire in diretta su Sky Sport e in streaming su NOW . Si tratta di Luciano Darderi che, reduce dalla sconfitta in finale (in due set contro Rublev) all'Atp di Bastad, fa il suo esordio nel 250 di Estoril dove si presenta da n. 2 del seeding (la testa di serie n. 1 resta il russo).

stories.title: CANLI | Beşiktaş - Midtjylland maçı ne zaman saat kaçta, hangi kanalda? (11'ler belli oldu)
stories.summary: 20:31 23 Temmuz 2026 "Kendimiz gibi oynamaya çalışacağız" Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano maç öncesi yayıncı kuruluşa şunları söyledi: "Kamptayken önemli prensiplerimiz üzerine çalıştık. Bugün de önemli bir rakibe karşı oynuyoruz. Kendimiz gibi oynamaya çalışacağız. Onları uzun oynamaya zorlayacağız. Top bizde olduğunda da şans yaratmaya çalışacağız, elimizden geleni yapacağız. 180 dakikalık bir maç bu, haftaya da bunun devamı olacak Danimarka'da." "ÖNEMLİ İSİMLER GELECEK" "Çok fazla genç oyuncu ile çalıştık kampta. Milli takımdan da oyuncular geç döndü aramıza, aramıza yeni arkadaşlar da gelince daha gerçek bir takım göreceğiz. Bazı önemli bölgelere önemli arkadaşlar gelecek.

stories.title: Incendies : quels sont les moyens dont dispose la France pour lutter contre les feux ?
stories.summary: Incendies : quels sont les moyens dont dispose la France pour lutter contre les feux ? Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? Inscrivez-vous gratuitement Les Décodeurs Les Décodeurs Incendies Depuis le début de l’été 2026, l’Hexagone fait face à une vague d’incendies sur l’ensemble de son territoire. De quoi mettre en lumière les dispositifs disponibles au sol comme dans les airs pour en éviter la propagation. Article réservé aux abonnés La saison 2026 des incendies a démarré de manière précoce et intense.

stories.title: Gerd Osenberg: Leichtathletik-Startrainer ist tot
stories.summary: Osenbergs Athletinnen und Athleten gewannen insgesamt elf olympische Medaillen, darunter vier goldene. Neben Ecker-Rosendahl, Nasse-Meyfarth und Henkel betreute er auch Liesel Westermann und Ellen Wessinghage. Allein bei den Sommerspielen 1972 in München war Osenberg für je zwei Gold- und Silbermedaillen sowie einmal Bronze mitverantwortlich. »Generationen geprägt« »Mit ihm verliert unser Verein eine der prägendsten Persönlichkeiten seiner Geschichte, einen außergewöhnlichen Trainer, Mentor und Menschen, dessen Wirken die Leichtathletik in Leverkusen über Jahrzehnte entscheidend geprägt hat.

stories.title: "Malgré un long massage cardiaque, il n’a pu être réanimé" : un jeune de 19 ans se noie après avoir échappé à la vigilance de ses éducateurs, à Palavas
stories.summary: Effervescence ce jeudi 23 juillet aux alentours de 17 heures sur la plage de l’Hôtel de ville à Palavas-les-Flots, entre le quai Paul-Cunq et le boulevard Sarrail, où un jeune homme, originaire de Savoie, a été secouru en urgence après avoir été repéré flottant à la surface de l’eau. Autopsie ordonnée "Malgré un long massage cardiaque, il n’a pu être réanimé", indique une source bien informée. Que ce soit par les secouristes du poste de secours puis par les sapeurs-pompiers de l’Hérault qui avaient, un temps, demandé le renfort de l’hélicoptère Dragon 34. Avant de l’annuler au vu de la tournure des événements.

stories.title: "Denis Drăguș, la FCSB?" Răspunsul lui Florin Cernat, chiar înaintea meciului cu Auda
stories.summary: La partida cu FK Auda, FCSB titularizează trei jucători aduși în această vară - Ronny Labonne, Eddy Gnahore și Aymen Boutoutaou. Florin Cernat, declarații înainte de FCSB - Auda: "Normal că ni-l dorim pe Drăguș"Florin Cernat speră ca noile achiziții să se impună cât mai rapid, iar FCSB să traverseze un sezon mult mai bun decât precedentul."Eu sunt sigur că vom avea o altă față. Sezonul trecut nu l-am terminat cum ne-am dorit, însă sezonul ăsta va fi altceva. După pregătirea făcută în Olanda am speranțe mari că vom avea o altă față.

stories.title: The Hundred 2026 results: Manchester Super Giants thrash dismal London Spirit at Lord's
stories.summary: The Hundred women's competition, Lord's London Spirit 80 all out (91 balls) : Kapp 17 (12); MacDonald-Gay 4-17 Manchester Super Giants 86-3 (59 balls) : Scholfield 22 (15); Kapp 2-18 Manchester Super Giants won by seven wickets Scorecard . Table Manchester Super Giants chased a target of 81 in just 59 balls as they thrashed London Spirit by seven wickets in The Hundred. Ryana MacDonald-Gay took 4-17 as Super Giants bowled out Spirit with nine balls to spare at Lord's, before the visiting batters completed their chase for the loss of just three wickets.

stories.title: Due turisti morsi da pesci in pochi giorni sulle spiagge del Cilento: abbondante perdita di sangue
stories.summary: Due episodi ravvicinati, entrambi avvenuti lungo il litorale cilentano, riaccendono l’attenzione sulla presenza di pesci che possono provocare ferite anche serie ai bagnanti. L’ultimo caso si è verificato a Palinuro, sulla spiaggia delle Saline, dove un turista di 76 anni è stato morso alla gamba mentre si trovava in acqua nel tratto di spiaggia libera. L’uomo, rientrato a riva, presentava una profonda ferita con un’abbondante perdita di sangue. Provvidenziale l’intervento dei bagnini in servizio, che hanno prestato le prime cure, tamponando l’emorragia e stabilizzando il turista in attesa dell’arrivo dei sanitari, che hanno poi provveduto alle cure del caso.

stories.title: Auto met caravan van de weg op de N31 bij Garijp | Gemeente Leeuwarden waarschuwt voor nepmail
stories.summary: Vier verdachten in onderzoek naar dood van Drachtster komen onder strikte voorwaarden vrij De vier verdachten die zijn opgepakt in het onderzoek naar de dood van de 22-jarige Kostiantyn in Drachten, worden "onder strikte voorwaarden in vrijheid gesteld". Dat meldt het Openbaar Ministerie. Volgens de raadkamer van de rechtbank ligt er genoeg verdenking om de jongens langer vast te houden, maar er wordt bij het besluit rekening gehouden met het feit dat de jongens minderjarig zijn. De jongens worden verdacht van diefstal met geweld, "onder meer het stelen en gebruiken van een bankpas".

stories.title: FC Schalke 04: Moussa Sylla sorgt für Dilemma: Diese Millionen-Frage treibt S04 um
stories.summary: TTS-Player überspringen Artikel weiterlesen Schalke im Glück! Moussa Sylla (26) ist zur PERFEKTEN Zeit in Topform. Nur muss der Aufsteiger jetzt eine superschwierige Frage beantworten… Seit Monaten steht fest, dass Königsblau Sylla gerne verticken würde. Die intern gewünschten sechs Mio. Euro will bloß niemand bezahlen. Zu mäßig lief die vergangene Spielzeit (30 Partien/7 Tore/3 Vorlagen). Zwar gab’s hier und da Anfragen, aber nie etwas Ernstes. Zumal Sylla selbst gar nicht unbedingt wegwill. Doch jetzt hat sich die Situation verändert. Der Malier präsentiert sich in bestechender Frühform.

stories.title: Hapless Hibs embarrassed by Kosovan minnows in Conference League
stories.summary: Hibs added Malisheva to Scottish football’s embarrassing list of European results after crashing to a 2-0 Conference League defeat to the Kosovan minnows. Kreshnik Uka tapped in after 21 minutes following an out of sorts first half from the visitors before Valmir Nafiu slammed in the second in the final minutes. It was a bitterly disappointing result but the Easter Road side only had themselves to blame for not being in a better position ahead of next week’s second qualifying round second leg after passing up several great chances. On loan Stoke City man Nathan Lowe was the main culprit after twice firing wide with just the keeper to beat.

stories.title: Michel Cardoze ancienne star de la météo : 35 ans après son dernier bulletin, il profite d’une retraite tranquille dans son castelnau médiéval gascon
stories.summary: Il n’aspirait pas à présenter les bulletins météo et pourtant, c’est dans ce «placard», occupé de 1987 à 1991, que Michel Cardoze est devenu l’une des personnalités les plus appréciées des Français. Son style inimitable, son allure décalée, son humour teinté d’une large culture littéraire et sa légèreté ont permis à la chaîne — devenue privée à la suite du rachat par le groupe de Francis Bouygues — de réaliser des records d’audience. Comme l’a rappelé Le Parisien dans son portrait consacré à l’ancien journaliste de L’Humanité, le tandem Alain Gillot-Pétré et Michel Cardoze pouvait réunir jusqu’à 10 millions de personnes.

stories.title: Venice Chief Alberto Barbera on Landing Robert Pattinson Film ‘Primetime’ at the Last Minute and Lack of U.S. Studios at the Festival: They Are ‘Experiencing an Identity Crisis’
stories.summary: Venice Film Festival chief Alberto Barbera has pulled off a pretty impressive feat this year by assembling a buzzy lineup with boatloads of stars set to disembark on the Lido, despite having less movies from the U.S. studios and streamers at his disposal. They include new projects from top international directors , including Martin McDonagh, Florian Zeller, Danny Boyle, Werner Herzog, Lance Oppenheim, Nanni Moretti, Hirokazu Kore-eda and Lee Chang-dong, plus the world premiere of Oasis reunion doc “Don’t Look Back in Anger,” with British brothers Liam and Noel Gallagher in tow.

stories.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
stories.summary: Temperatures in Malaga hit 40 degrees Celsius on July 23, 2026, with inland areas reaching 45 degrees. A hot Terral wind and Saharan dust haze worsened conditions as residents struggled to stay cool. Authorities warned of continued extreme heat through the weekend.

stories.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
stories.summary: Ukraine’s ousted defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov has refused an alternative role in President Volodymyr Zelensky’s government, demanding reinstatement. Fedorov, 35, who led military reforms and anti-corruption efforts, was removed last week sparking protests. Demonstrators continue to demand his return as Zelensky reshuffles top military leadership.

stories.title: Russell proud of resilience after string of problems
stories.summary: Lewis Hamilton won the Belgian Grand Prix ahead of teammate George Russell, who recovered to finish third after a weekend plagued by electrical power issues. Russell cut his championship deficit from 66 to 25 points over the last three races but admitted more work is needed. Mercedes identified the problem before Hungary, where Russell aims to build on this progress.

stories.title: ‘Percy Jackson’ Season 3 Drops First Opening Scene Footage at Comic-Con as Walker Scobell Tells Fans the New Episodes Will Stay True to ‘Titan’s Curse’ Book
stories.summary: Disney+ unveiled the first footage of Season 3 of "Percy Jackson and the Olympians" at San Diego Comic-Con, showcasing the adaptation of Rick Riordan's "The Titan's Curse." Walker Scobell, who plays Percy, assured fans that the new episodes will remain faithful to the beloved book. The season will continue the adventures of Percy, Grover, and their Camp Half-Blood companions, introducing new characters along the way.

stories.title: St Gallen vs Benfica LIVE Score Updates in UEFA Europa League Match
stories.summary: LIVE UPDATES Get real-time updates on ST Gallen vs Benfica live coverage, minute by minute of the match, score, how to watch, stream information and latest updates of 2026-27 UEFA Europa League Preliminary Round (1st Leg) with VAVEL. LIVE UPDATES Refresh Updates For the opening match, Marco Silva will have some important absences: midfielder Leandro Barreiro is out due to a respiratory infection, while left winger Gianluca Prestianni is suspended and new signing John Durán was not included in the squad for the match. The referee for the match will be Luca Pairetto (ITA), assisted by Stefano Alassio (ITA) and Valerio Colarossi (ITA).

stories.title: Preview: St Gallen vs Benfica - prediction, team news, lineups
stories.summary: Benfica kick off their Europa League campaign Thursday with a second-round first leg at Swiss side St Gallen. The Portuguese giants, now led by Marco Silva after Jose Mourinho’s departure, face a two-legged tie following a third-place finish in last season’s Primeira Liga. The match at Sitterstadion marks Benfica’s return to continental action after two pre-season friendlies.

stories.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
stories.summary: President Donald Trump says Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel to secure a U.S. nuclear energy deal. The agreement, which bans uranium enrichment, hinges on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords. Saudi officials have not yet responded to the condition.

stories.title: FCC Poised to Hand Broadcasters Long-Sought Win in Abolishing Station Ownership Cap as Brendan Carr Probes Tension Between TV Groups and Platforms
stories.summary: Broadcast TV station owners have been stuck in media’s wilderness for most of the past two decades or so as the internet and streaming have defined the state of the art in television. But this year, independent broadcast TV station owners are being heard as they haven’t in years by crusading Federal Communications Commission chairman Brendan Carr, who has probed into areas of long-festering aggravation for station owners. Carr is poised to bring broadcasters a long-sought victory by removing the “station cap,” or the FCC regulation that limits the number of U.S. TV stations that a single entity can own. The FCC is set to vote Aug.

stories.title: Wolves training cancelled after Arokodare refuses to leave pitch
stories.summary: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare’s training session was cancelled after he refused to leave the pitch. The incident follows Wolves rejecting a bid from Fiorentina while accepting an offer from Trabzonspor for the forward. Arokodare remains under contract and has reiterated his commitment to training professionally.

stories.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
stories.summary: Luka Modric, 40, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan. The Croatian midfielder, who turns 41 in September, will continue with the Serie A club after joining last summer. Milan finished fifth in Serie A last season and aims to bounce back under his leadership.

stories.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
stories.summary: Google and Tesla shares plunged sharply on Thursday after both companies reported negative free cash flow and massive AI spending plans. Alphabet’s stock fell over 7% while Tesla’s dropped 13.5% as investors question when returns will materialize. Major tech firms are racing to invest billions in AI, raising concerns over long-term financial sustainability.

stories.title: EPM hace fuerte llamado ante posibles efectos del fenómeno de El Niño
stories.summary: EPM advirtió que el posible fenómeno de El Niño exige acciones urgentes para garantizar el suministro de agua, energía y gas. La empresa reportó un aumento de 160 litros por segundo en la demanda de agua potable, equivalente al consumo de 107.000 personas. EPM instó a la ciudadanía a ahorrar recursos mientras refuerza sus sistemas de bombeo y plantas de potabilización.

stories.title: How and Where to Watch: St. Gallen vs. Benfica live on beIN SPORTS
stories.summary: Benfica kicks off its UEFA Europa League campaign against Swiss side St. Gallen in the second qualifying round opener on Tuesday, July 23. The first leg will be broadcast live on beIN SPORTS for viewers in the United States. The Portuguese club aims to advance past this stage as it targets a return to the group stage.

stories.title: Lobbying firm pressed for details about payments to journalists for favourable stories
stories.summary: A political lobbying firm, CT Group, is under fire for allegedly paying journalists for favourable stories, prompting calls for full disclosure and an overhaul of lobbying rules. The firm, co-founded by election strategist Lynton Crosby, faces condemnation from MPs, lobbyists and transparency campaigners. Critics warn the practice threatens journalism ethics and democracy.

stories.title: Temporali e forti raffiche, allerta gialla in Calabria
stories.summary: Temporali anche di forte intensità, grandinate e raffiche di vento sono attesi nelle prossime ore sulle regioni adriatiche. Il Dipartimento della Protezione civile ha emesso un avviso di condizioni meteorologiche avverse e valutato, per venerdì 24 luglio, l’allerta gialla meteo-idro in Calabria, Puglia e sui settori costieri dell’Emilia-Romagna. A provocare il peggioramento è un’area depressionaria posizionata tra la Polonia e la penisola scandinava, che sta spingendo correnti più fresche dall’Europa centrale verso la Grecia. Le infiltrazioni settentrionali interesseranno anche il versante adriatico italiano, favorendo lo sviluppo di fenomeni temporaleschi localmente molto intensi.

stories.title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
stories.summary: Tesla's robotaxi program is facing scrutiny as CEO Elon Musk reported flat mileage growth and a potential decline in the number of vehicles during an earnings call. Despite claims of 380,000 miles driven across six cities, concerns about safety and the program's future persist. As Tesla aims to expand its robotaxi service, the company must address these challenges to regain public confidence.

stories.title: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
stories.summary: Corsair’s Frame 4500X RS PC case is now $119.99, a $70 discount from its usual price. The mid-tower case supports EATX motherboards and GPUs up to 460mm with a panoramic glass front and side panel. Three ARGB-lit fans with reverse rotors pull in air while showcasing the case’s interior.

stories.title: Argentina, asombrada y dolida por la ola de rechazo: "El mundo va a ver dónde puede llegar un país lleno de argentinos"
stories.summary: Argentina no supo c�mo atacar ante Espa�a en la final de la Copa del Mundo y ahora no sabe c�mo defenderse: asombrada y dolida ante la ola de rechazo y cr�ticas en las redes sociales, el pa�s de Jorge Luis Borges, Julio Cort�zar, Diego Armando Maradona y Leo Messi se encastilla sin encontrar una estrategia para volver a seducir a aquellos que hasta hace poco lo admiraban. "�Tienes enemigos? Bien, eso significa que has defendido algo en alg�n momento de tu vida", escribi� en las redes sociales el presidente Javier Milei, apelando a una cita ap�crifa de Winston Churchill. stories.title: Thursday's football tips: Besiktas look good at 21/20 in the corner handicap against Midtjylland
stories.summary: We're only in the second round of Europa League qualifying but there's a couple of ties that wouldn't look out of place in the knockout stages. stories.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
stories.summary: Yemen's Houthi movement attacked two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea on Wednesday, claiming they violated a blockade, with one tanker confirmed hit and causing a fire. This incident coincides with the U.S. conducting its 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran, prompting President Trump to warn of "major military punishment" if the Houthis strike again. As tensions escalate, Iran's military has threatened retaliation against bases used for these U.S. operations.

stories.title: Great results for Rīga in European football / Article
stories.summary: Rīga defeated Vardar Skopje 3:2 to take an important lead into return match which will be held in the Latvian capital next Tuesday. The winners of the two legs on aggregate will face the winners of the clash between Bise "Atert" (Luxembourg) and Győr OTO (Hungary) in the third round of qualification. Meanwhile three Latvian clubs will play their first games in the second qualifying round of the Conference League on Thursday. Premier League leaders RFS will host Icelandic Cup holders Vestri, FK Liepāja will face Austria Vienna in Jūrmala owing to the fact that their pitch has been destroyed, and Auda will take on FCSB in Romania.

stories.title: Giovanni Ayroldi designato nella squadra arbitrale nei preliminari di Europa League
stories.summary: L'arbitro molfettese sarà quarto ufficiale nella gara d'andata tra San Gallo e Benfica Nuova designazione internazionale per Giovanni Ayroldi. L'arbitro molfettese è stato scelto dalla UEFA come quarto ufficiale per la sfida tra St. Gallen e Benfica, valida per la gara d'andata del secondo turno di qualificazione di Europa League. L'incontro si disputerà giovedì 23 luglio, con calcio d'inizio alle ore 20, al Sitterstadion di San Gallo, in Svizzera. La squadra arbitrale sarà interamente italiana. A dirigere la gara sarà Luca Pairetto, assistito da Stefano Alassio e Valerio Colarossi.

stories.title: Volley, Antropova trascina l’Italia: Olanda dominata nei quarti di Nations League
stories.summary: Tutto facile per l'Italia di Julio Velasco nei quarti di finale della VNL femminile di volley, in corso di svolgimento a Macao. Con una prestazione di altissimo livello, le azzurre hanno battuto 3-0 l'Olanda con parziali di 25-21, 25-19, 25-16 trascinate da una Kate Antropova a tratti incontenibile. In semifinale le azzurre affronteranno la vincente tra Brasile e Giappone. Partenza lanciata delle azzurre Contro l'Olanda di Felix Koslowski, le azzurre iniziano con il sestetto tipo di questa estate: Orro e Antropova in diagonale opposto-palleggiatore, Sylla e Nervini schiacciatrici, Danesi e Fahr al centro, e Fersino libero.
stories.trend: volleyball nations league di pallavolo femminile

stories.title: "Diese Ochsenknechts": RTL stoppt Ausstrahlung der Doku-Soap
stories.summary: Nach drei Folgen RTL setzt "Diese Ochsenknechts" ab 23.07.2026 - 17:22 Uhr Lesedauer: 2 Min. Seit Anfang Juli war die Doku-Soap "Diese Ochsenknechts" erstmals im Free-TV zu sehen. Doch die Zuschauerzahlen sanken von Woche zu Woche – nun zieht RTL die Konsequenzen. Bei Sky lief die Reality-Doku "Diese Ochsenknechts" sehr erfolgreich. Nach der Übernahme des Pay-TV-Angebots durch RTL wollte der Sender die fünfte Staffel erstmals auch im Free-TV zeigen. Doch nach drei Folgen nimmt RTL die Sendung wieder aus dem Programm. Das berichten die Medienmagazine "Quotenmeter" und "DWDL". Seit dem 5.

stories.title: Rekordvärvningen klar för Bajen i natt
stories.summary: Bekräftat: Boudri klar för Hammarby Alexander Jonsson och Max Blomqvist Publicerad 2026-07-22 23:54Uppdaterad 15:12 Det har varit en illa dold hemlighet. Nu är Amin Boudri, 21, presenterad av Hammarby. Mittfältaren blir allsvenskans dyraste värvning genom tiderna. IKVÄLL 19.00: Se Hammarby–Anderlecht exklusivt på Sportbladet Amin Boudri lämnade i vintras Gais och allsvenskan för LAFC i MLS. Men utlandssejouren blir kortvarig. Efter en tids spekulationer har Hammarby nu presenterat mittfältaren. Enligt Sportbladets uppgifter blir han allsvenskans dyraste värvning någonsin då han uppges kosta omkring 37 miljoner kronor. – Känslan är på topp.

stories.title: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
stories.summary: Houthi attacks in the Red Sea have forced ships to reroute, threatening a key trade artery between Europe and Asia. US Central Command has conducted 12 consecutive nights of airstrikes on Iranian coastal targets. Saudi vessels were struck this week as tensions rise across the Middle East.

stories.title: Modi Caught Off Guard as India’s Economic Failings Inflame Young People
stories.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi was busy trying to put out other fires when a student movement suddenly exploded. There are no easy solutions to the problems behind it.

stories.title: Israel Welcomes Trump’s Demand for Diplomatic Ties With Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: Israeli officials greeted the possibility of normalized ties, but analysts said the U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal nonetheless remained bad for Israel.

stories.title: BBC Inside Science
stories.summary: The U.S. military will begin screening personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, with those diagnosed offered voluntary hormone replacement therapy. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated this initiative aims to maintain a "healthy, capable, and decisively dominant fighting force." The program reflects ongoing efforts to enhance military readiness and performance among service members.

stories.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings With Iraq
stories.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

stories.title: Trump Prepares Yet Another Strategy to Resurrect Global Tariffs
stories.summary: The administration’s 10 percent global tariffs are set to expire at midnight, but officials have been preparing replacements.

stories.title: NASA’s MAVEN Illuminates New Understanding of Auroras at Mars
stories.summary: NASA’s MAVEN mission revealed Mars experiences auroras formed by the same process that creates Earth’s northern and southern lights. Data shows the Dungey cycle, which drives auroras here, operates on Mars at smaller scales due to weaker magnetic fields. Scientists continue analyzing MAVEN’s final data to guide future Mars exploration.

stories.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
stories.summary: 1 min read HQ Web Team Jul 23, 2026 Image Article Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans transport the 130-foot-tall Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank out of a production cell inside the main factory building into a detached test building on a separate portion of the 829-acre site on May 15, 2026. The liquid hydrogen tank will form part of the core stage for the SLS (Space Launch System) rocket, providing thousands of gallons of super-cold propellant to one of four RS-25 engines.

stories.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
stories.summary: A new report reveals petrol pump thefts surged 40% in the UK last year, prompting calls for pre-payment systems. Thieves are exploiting unattended pumps, costing forecourt owners thousands weekly. Industry leaders will meet next month to discuss tighter security measures.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: Long-term exposure to road traffic noise is associated with a higher risk of Parkinson’s disease, the biggest study of its kind has found. Parkinson’s disease is a progressive disorder in which parts of the brain become damaged over time, affecting movement and balance. Existing research has found potential biological pathways that link noise exposure to Parkinson’s disease, largely due to stress responses and disrupted sleep. The researchers modelled noise exposure at the most and least exposed exterior of the residence of each participant and calculated the difference in noise levels.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

offbeat.title: "Erano stanchi, non trovando un taxi ad alta quota hanno chiamato il 112. Non si fa così": la rabbia del soccorso alpino del Trentino per le chiamate assurde degli escursionisti in montagna
offbeat.summary: Le tre richieste della notte: dalla ferrata al taxi mancante a Peio La sequenza di allarmi ha avuto inizio intorno alle 20:30 sulle Dolomiti di Brenta. Due escursionisti stranieri, di ritorno dalla nota ferrata delle Bocchette Centrali, si sono ritrovati bloccati lungo il sentiero Violi, stremati e disidratati. In questo caso, il tecnico di Centrale è riuscito a monitorare e guidare telefonicamente la coppia fino a farle raggiungere in totale autonomia la zona di Vallesinella. Intorno alle 23:00, il centralino ha squillato per una seconda emergenza anomala.

offbeat.title: Woman, 20s, arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident in Co Monaghan
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

offbeat.title: Breve tregua dal caldo in Puglia: scatta l'allerta gialla per temporali e vento forte in tutta la regione
offbeat.summary: Per qualche ora si torna a respirare. Dopo le ondate di calore dei giorni scorsi, la Protezione civile ha diramato un bollettino di allerta gialla per rischio idrogeologico e idrogeologico per temporali, valido dalle 14 di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, fino alla mezzanotte. Oggi sono previste precipitazioni sparse, a prevalente carattere di rovescio o temporale, sulla Puglia centro-settentrionale, con quantitativi cumulati da deboli a puntualmente moderati. Domani invece toccherà alla Puglia meridionale, dove soffieranno venti forti settentrionali con rinforzi fino a burrasca.

offbeat.title: De Jong sufre una rotura del ligamento lateral interno de la rodilla derecha
offbeat.summary: El Barcelona confirmó hoy el alcance de la lesión de Frenkie de Jong. El club informó que el centrocampista neerlandés sufre una rotura del ligamento lateral interno de la rodilla derecha y, aunque la entidad no ha determinado el tiempo de baja, estará varias semanas, una noticia que obliga a Hansi Flick a comenzar la temporada sin uno de sus futbolistas más importantes. Eso sí, el internacional no pasará por quirófano. El internacional neerlandés se sometió a nuevas pruebas médicas que permitieron determinar el alcance exacto de la dolencia, después de varios días de exploraciones. Tal y como adelantó MARCA, el mediocentro arrastraba una lesión en la rodilla.

offbeat.title: Dode na roofoverval op bank in Duitsland, verdachte opgepakt
offbeat.summary: In de Duitse stad Regensburg is een dode gevallen bij een roofoverval op een bank. De verdachte, een 20-jarige Duitse man, zou het slachtoffer met een mes hebben aangevallen. De politie vermoedde aanvankelijk dat er sprake was van een gijzeling, maar onderzoekt het incident nu als moord en een roofoverval. Het slachtoffer, vermoedelijk een bankmedewerker, wist na het geweld nog naar buiten te vluchten. De man werd met levensbedreigende verwondingen naar het ziekenhuis gebracht. Daar is hij overleden. De dader hield zich ondertussen urenlang op in het gebouw. Hij werd aan het eind van de middag gearresteerd.

offbeat.title: Darderi debutta a Estoril: il programma su Sky
offbeat.summary: Torna in campo oggi Luciano Darderi dopo la sconfitta nell'ultima finale dell'Open svedese. L'italoargentino fa il suo debutto nel 250 di Estoril e se la vedrà contro lo spagnolo Pedro Martinez, in diretta su Sky Sport e in streaming su NOW : in palio un posto nei quarti di finale DARDERI-MARTINEZ LIVE In questo giovedì di tennis torna protagonista l'azzurro con un italiano in campo, da seguire in diretta su Sky Sport e in streaming su NOW . Si tratta di Luciano Darderi che, reduce dalla sconfitta in finale (in due set contro Rublev) all'Atp di Bastad, fa il suo esordio nel 250 di Estoril dove si presenta da n. 2 del seeding (la testa di serie n. 1 resta il russo).

offbeat.title: CANLI | Beşiktaş - Midtjylland maçı ne zaman saat kaçta, hangi kanalda? (11'ler belli oldu)
offbeat.summary: 20:31 23 Temmuz 2026 "Kendimiz gibi oynamaya çalışacağız" Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano maç öncesi yayıncı kuruluşa şunları söyledi: "Kamptayken önemli prensiplerimiz üzerine çalıştık. Bugün de önemli bir rakibe karşı oynuyoruz. Kendimiz gibi oynamaya çalışacağız. Onları uzun oynamaya zorlayacağız. Top bizde olduğunda da şans yaratmaya çalışacağız, elimizden geleni yapacağız. 180 dakikalık bir maç bu, haftaya da bunun devamı olacak Danimarka'da." "ÖNEMLİ İSİMLER GELECEK" "Çok fazla genç oyuncu ile çalıştık kampta. Milli takımdan da oyuncular geç döndü aramıza, aramıza yeni arkadaşlar da gelince daha gerçek bir takım göreceğiz. Bazı önemli bölgelere önemli arkadaşlar gelecek.

offbeat.summary: Incendies : quels sont les moyens dont dispose la France pour lutter contre les feux ? Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? De quoi mettre en lumière les dispositifs disponibles au sol comme dans les airs pour en éviter la propagation. offbeat.title: Gerd Osenberg: Leichtathletik-Startrainer ist tot
offbeat.summary: Osenbergs Athletinnen und Athleten gewannen insgesamt elf olympische Medaillen, darunter vier goldene. Neben Ecker-Rosendahl, Nasse-Meyfarth und Henkel betreute er auch Liesel Westermann und Ellen Wessinghage. Allein bei den Sommerspielen 1972 in München war Osenberg für je zwei Gold- und Silbermedaillen sowie einmal Bronze mitverantwortlich. »Generationen geprägt« »Mit ihm verliert unser Verein eine der prägendsten Persönlichkeiten seiner Geschichte, einen außergewöhnlichen Trainer, Mentor und Menschen, dessen Wirken die Leichtathletik in Leverkusen über Jahrzehnte entscheidend geprägt hat.

offbeat.title: "Malgré un long massage cardiaque, il n’a pu être réanimé" : un jeune de 19 ans se noie après avoir échappé à la vigilance de ses éducateurs, à Palavas
offbeat.summary: Effervescence ce jeudi 23 juillet aux alentours de 17 heures sur la plage de l’Hôtel de ville à Palavas-les-Flots, entre le quai Paul-Cunq et le boulevard Sarrail, où un jeune homme, originaire de Savoie, a été secouru en urgence après avoir été repéré flottant à la surface de l’eau. Autopsie ordonnée "Malgré un long massage cardiaque, il n’a pu être réanimé", indique une source bien informée. Que ce soit par les secouristes du poste de secours puis par les sapeurs-pompiers de l’Hérault qui avaient, un temps, demandé le renfort de l’hélicoptère Dragon 34. Avant de l’annuler au vu de la tournure des événements.

offbeat.title: "Denis Drăguș, la FCSB?" Răspunsul lui Florin Cernat, chiar înaintea meciului cu Auda
offbeat.summary: La partida cu FK Auda, FCSB titularizează trei jucători aduși în această vară - Ronny Labonne, Eddy Gnahore și Aymen Boutoutaou. Florin Cernat, declarații înainte de FCSB - Auda: "Normal că ni-l dorim pe Drăguș"Florin Cernat speră ca noile achiziții să se impună cât mai rapid, iar FCSB să traverseze un sezon mult mai bun decât precedentul."Eu sunt sigur că vom avea o altă față. Sezonul trecut nu l-am terminat cum ne-am dorit, însă sezonul ăsta va fi altceva. După pregătirea făcută în Olanda am speranțe mari că vom avea o altă față.

offbeat.title: The Hundred 2026 results: Manchester Super Giants thrash dismal London Spirit at Lord's
offbeat.summary: The Hundred women's competition, Lord's London Spirit 80 all out (91 balls) : Kapp 17 (12); MacDonald-Gay 4-17 Manchester Super Giants 86-3 (59 balls) : Scholfield 22 (15); Kapp 2-18 Manchester Super Giants won by seven wickets Scorecard . Table Manchester Super Giants chased a target of 81 in just 59 balls as they thrashed London Spirit by seven wickets in The Hundred. Ryana MacDonald-Gay took 4-17 as Super Giants bowled out Spirit with nine balls to spare at Lord's, before the visiting batters completed their chase for the loss of just three wickets.

offbeat.title: Due turisti morsi da pesci in pochi giorni sulle spiagge del Cilento: abbondante perdita di sangue
offbeat.summary: Due episodi ravvicinati, entrambi avvenuti lungo il litorale cilentano, riaccendono l’attenzione sulla presenza di pesci che possono provocare ferite anche serie ai bagnanti. L’ultimo caso si è verificato a Palinuro, sulla spiaggia delle Saline, dove un turista di 76 anni è stato morso alla gamba mentre si trovava in acqua nel tratto di spiaggia libera. L’uomo, rientrato a riva, presentava una profonda ferita con un’abbondante perdita di sangue. Provvidenziale l’intervento dei bagnini in servizio, che hanno prestato le prime cure, tamponando l’emorragia e stabilizzando il turista in attesa dell’arrivo dei sanitari, che hanno poi provveduto alle cure del caso.

offbeat.title: Auto met caravan van de weg op de N31 bij Garijp | Gemeente Leeuwarden waarschuwt voor nepmail
offbeat.summary: Vier verdachten in onderzoek naar dood van Drachtster komen onder strikte voorwaarden vrij De vier verdachten die zijn opgepakt in het onderzoek naar de dood van de 22-jarige Kostiantyn in Drachten, worden "onder strikte voorwaarden in vrijheid gesteld". Dat meldt het Openbaar Ministerie. Volgens de raadkamer van de rechtbank ligt er genoeg verdenking om de jongens langer vast te houden, maar er wordt bij het besluit rekening gehouden met het feit dat de jongens minderjarig zijn. De jongens worden verdacht van diefstal met geweld, "onder meer het stelen en gebruiken van een bankpas".

offbeat.title: FC Schalke 04: Moussa Sylla sorgt für Dilemma: Diese Millionen-Frage treibt S04 um
offbeat.summary: TTS-Player überspringen Artikel weiterlesen Schalke im Glück! Moussa Sylla (26) ist zur PERFEKTEN Zeit in Topform. Nur muss der Aufsteiger jetzt eine superschwierige Frage beantworten… Seit Monaten steht fest, dass Königsblau Sylla gerne verticken würde. Die intern gewünschten sechs Mio. Euro will bloß niemand bezahlen. Zu mäßig lief die vergangene Spielzeit (30 Partien/7 Tore/3 Vorlagen). Zwar gab’s hier und da Anfragen, aber nie etwas Ernstes. Zumal Sylla selbst gar nicht unbedingt wegwill. Doch jetzt hat sich die Situation verändert. Der Malier präsentiert sich in bestechender Frühform.

offbeat.title: Hapless Hibs embarrassed by Kosovan minnows in Conference League
offbeat.summary: Hibs added Malisheva to Scottish football’s embarrassing list of European results after crashing to a 2-0 Conference League defeat to the Kosovan minnows. Kreshnik Uka tapped in after 21 minutes following an out of sorts first half from the visitors before Valmir Nafiu slammed in the second in the final minutes. It was a bitterly disappointing result but the Easter Road side only had themselves to blame for not being in a better position ahead of next week’s second qualifying round second leg after passing up several great chances. On loan Stoke City man Nathan Lowe was the main culprit after twice firing wide with just the keeper to beat.

offbeat.title: Michel Cardoze ancienne star de la météo : 35 ans après son dernier bulletin, il profite d’une retraite tranquille dans son castelnau médiéval gascon
offbeat.summary: Il n’aspirait pas à présenter les bulletins météo et pourtant, c’est dans ce «placard», occupé de 1987 à 1991, que Michel Cardoze est devenu l’une des personnalités les plus appréciées des Français. Son style inimitable, son allure décalée, son humour teinté d’une large culture littéraire et sa légèreté ont permis à la chaîne — devenue privée à la suite du rachat par le groupe de Francis Bouygues — de réaliser des records d’audience. Comme l’a rappelé Le Parisien dans son portrait consacré à l’ancien journaliste de L’Humanité, le tandem Alain Gillot-Pétré et Michel Cardoze pouvait réunir jusqu’à 10 millions de personnes.

offbeat.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
offbeat.summary: Temperatures in Malaga hit 40 degrees Celsius on July 23, 2026, with inland areas reaching 45 degrees. A hot Terral wind and Saharan dust haze worsened conditions as residents struggled to stay cool. Authorities warned of continued extreme heat through the weekend.

offbeat.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
offbeat.summary: Ukraine’s ousted defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov has refused an alternative role in President Volodymyr Zelensky’s government, demanding reinstatement. Fedorov, 35, who led military reforms and anti-corruption efforts, was removed last week sparking protests. Demonstrators continue to demand his return as Zelensky reshuffles top military leadership.

offbeat.title: St Gallen vs Benfica LIVE Score Updates in UEFA Europa League Match
offbeat.summary: LIVE UPDATES Get real-time updates on ST Gallen vs Benfica live coverage, minute by minute of the match, score, how to watch, stream information and latest updates of 2026-27 UEFA Europa League Preliminary Round (1st Leg) with VAVEL. LIVE UPDATES Refresh Updates For the opening match, Marco Silva will have some important absences: midfielder Leandro Barreiro is out due to a respiratory infection, while left winger Gianluca Prestianni is suspended and new signing John Durán was not included in the squad for the match. The referee for the match will be Luca Pairetto (ITA), assisted by Stefano Alassio (ITA) and Valerio Colarossi (ITA).

offbeat.title: Preview: St Gallen vs Benfica - prediction, team news, lineups
offbeat.summary: Benfica kick off their Europa League campaign Thursday with a second-round first leg at Swiss side St Gallen. The Portuguese giants, now led by Marco Silva after Jose Mourinho’s departure, face a two-legged tie following a third-place finish in last season’s Primeira Liga. The match at Sitterstadion marks Benfica’s return to continental action after two pre-season friendlies.

offbeat.title: EPM hace fuerte llamado ante posibles efectos del fenómeno de El Niño
offbeat.summary: EPM advirtió que el posible fenómeno de El Niño exige acciones urgentes para garantizar el suministro de agua, energía y gas. La empresa reportó un aumento de 160 litros por segundo en la demanda de agua potable, equivalente al consumo de 107.000 personas. EPM instó a la ciudadanía a ahorrar recursos mientras refuerza sus sistemas de bombeo y plantas de potabilización.

offbeat.title: How and Where to Watch: St. Gallen vs. Benfica live on beIN SPORTS
offbeat.summary: Benfica kicks off its UEFA Europa League campaign against Swiss side St. Gallen in the second qualifying round opener on Tuesday, July 23. The first leg will be broadcast live on beIN SPORTS for viewers in the United States. The Portuguese club aims to advance past this stage as it targets a return to the group stage.

offbeat.title: Temporali e forti raffiche, allerta gialla in Calabria
offbeat.summary: Temporali anche di forte intensità, grandinate e raffiche di vento sono attesi nelle prossime ore sulle regioni adriatiche. Il Dipartimento della Protezione civile ha emesso un avviso di condizioni meteorologiche avverse e valutato, per venerdì 24 luglio, l’allerta gialla meteo-idro in Calabria, Puglia e sui settori costieri dell’Emilia-Romagna. A provocare il peggioramento è un’area depressionaria posizionata tra la Polonia e la penisola scandinava, che sta spingendo correnti più fresche dall’Europa centrale verso la Grecia. Le infiltrazioni settentrionali interesseranno anche il versante adriatico italiano, favorendo lo sviluppo di fenomeni temporaleschi localmente molto intensi.

offbeat.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
offbeat.summary: Yemen's Houthi movement attacked two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea on Wednesday, claiming they violated a blockade, with one tanker confirmed hit and causing a fire. This incident coincides with the U.S. conducting its 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran, prompting President Trump to warn of "major military punishment" if the Houthis strike again. As tensions escalate, Iran's military has threatened retaliation against bases used for these U.S. operations.

offbeat.title: Great results for Rīga in European football / Article
offbeat.summary: Rīga defeated Vardar Skopje 3:2 to take an important lead into return match which will be held in the Latvian capital next Tuesday. The winners of the two legs on aggregate will face the winners of the clash between Bise "Atert" (Luxembourg) and Győr OTO (Hungary) in the third round of qualification. Meanwhile three Latvian clubs will play their first games in the second qualifying round of the Conference League on Thursday. Premier League leaders RFS will host Icelandic Cup holders Vestri, FK Liepāja will face Austria Vienna in Jūrmala owing to the fact that their pitch has been destroyed, and Auda will take on FCSB in Romania.

offbeat.title: Giovanni Ayroldi designato nella squadra arbitrale nei preliminari di Europa League
offbeat.summary: L'arbitro molfettese sarà quarto ufficiale nella gara d'andata tra San Gallo e Benfica Nuova designazione internazionale per Giovanni Ayroldi. L'arbitro molfettese è stato scelto dalla UEFA come quarto ufficiale per la sfida tra St. Gallen e Benfica, valida per la gara d'andata del secondo turno di qualificazione di Europa League. L'incontro si disputerà giovedì 23 luglio, con calcio d'inizio alle ore 20, al Sitterstadion di San Gallo, in Svizzera. La squadra arbitrale sarà interamente italiana. A dirigere la gara sarà Luca Pairetto, assistito da Stefano Alassio e Valerio Colarossi.

offbeat.title: Volley, Antropova trascina l’Italia: Olanda dominata nei quarti di Nations League
offbeat.summary: Tutto facile per l'Italia di Julio Velasco nei quarti di finale della VNL femminile di volley, in corso di svolgimento a Macao. Con una prestazione di altissimo livello, le azzurre hanno battuto 3-0 l'Olanda con parziali di 25-21, 25-19, 25-16 trascinate da una Kate Antropova a tratti incontenibile. In semifinale le azzurre affronteranno la vincente tra Brasile e Giappone. Partenza lanciata delle azzurre Contro l'Olanda di Felix Koslowski, le azzurre iniziano con il sestetto tipo di questa estate: Orro e Antropova in diagonale opposto-palleggiatore, Sylla e Nervini schiacciatrici, Danesi e Fahr al centro, e Fersino libero.
offbeat.trend: volleyball nations league di pallavolo femminile

offbeat.title: "Diese Ochsenknechts": RTL stoppt Ausstrahlung der Doku-Soap
offbeat.summary: Nach drei Folgen RTL setzt "Diese Ochsenknechts" ab 23.07.2026 - 17:22 Uhr Lesedauer: 2 Min. Seit Anfang Juli war die Doku-Soap "Diese Ochsenknechts" erstmals im Free-TV zu sehen. Doch die Zuschauerzahlen sanken von Woche zu Woche – nun zieht RTL die Konsequenzen. Bei Sky lief die Reality-Doku "Diese Ochsenknechts" sehr erfolgreich. Nach der Übernahme des Pay-TV-Angebots durch RTL wollte der Sender die fünfte Staffel erstmals auch im Free-TV zeigen. Doch nach drei Folgen nimmt RTL die Sendung wieder aus dem Programm. Das berichten die Medienmagazine "Quotenmeter" und "DWDL". Seit dem 5.

offbeat.title: Rekordvärvningen klar för Bajen i natt
offbeat.summary: Bekräftat: Boudri klar för Hammarby Alexander Jonsson och Max Blomqvist Publicerad 2026-07-22 23:54Uppdaterad 15:12 Det har varit en illa dold hemlighet. Nu är Amin Boudri, 21, presenterad av Hammarby. Mittfältaren blir allsvenskans dyraste värvning genom tiderna. IKVÄLL 19.00: Se Hammarby–Anderlecht exklusivt på Sportbladet Amin Boudri lämnade i vintras Gais och allsvenskan för LAFC i MLS. Men utlandssejouren blir kortvarig. Efter en tids spekulationer har Hammarby nu presenterat mittfältaren. Enligt Sportbladets uppgifter blir han allsvenskans dyraste värvning någonsin då han uppges kosta omkring 37 miljoner kronor. – Känslan är på topp.

offbeat.title: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
offbeat.summary: Houthi attacks in the Red Sea have forced ships to reroute, threatening a key trade artery between Europe and Asia. US Central Command has conducted 12 consecutive nights of airstrikes on Iranian coastal targets. Saudi vessels were struck this week as tensions rise across the Middle East.

entertainment.title: Venice Chief Alberto Barbera on Landing Robert Pattinson Film ‘Primetime’ at the Last Minute and Lack of U.S. Studios at the Festival: They Are ‘Experiencing an Identity Crisis’
entertainment.summary: Venice Film Festival chief Alberto Barbera has pulled off a pretty impressive feat this year by assembling a buzzy lineup with boatloads of stars set to disembark on the Lido, despite having less movies from the U.S. studios and streamers at his disposal. They include new projects from top international directors , including Martin McDonagh, Florian Zeller, Danny Boyle, Werner Herzog, Lance Oppenheim, Nanni Moretti, Hirokazu Kore-eda and Lee Chang-dong, plus the world premiere of Oasis reunion doc “Don’t Look Back in Anger,” with British brothers Liam and Noel Gallagher in tow.

entertainment.title: ‘Percy Jackson’ Season 3 Drops First Opening Scene Footage at Comic-Con as Walker Scobell Tells Fans the New Episodes Will Stay True to ‘Titan’s Curse’ Book
entertainment.summary: Disney+ unveiled the first footage of Season 3 of "Percy Jackson and the Olympians" at San Diego Comic-Con, showcasing the adaptation of Rick Riordan's "The Titan's Curse." Walker Scobell, who plays Percy, assured fans that the new episodes will remain faithful to the beloved book. The season will continue the adventures of Percy, Grover, and their Camp Half-Blood companions, introducing new characters along the way.

entertainment.title: FCC Poised to Hand Broadcasters Long-Sought Win in Abolishing Station Ownership Cap as Brendan Carr Probes Tension Between TV Groups and Platforms
entertainment.summary: Broadcast TV station owners have been stuck in media’s wilderness for most of the past two decades or so as the internet and streaming have defined the state of the art in television. But this year, independent broadcast TV station owners are being heard as they haven’t in years by crusading Federal Communications Commission chairman Brendan Carr, who has probed into areas of long-festering aggravation for station owners. Carr is poised to bring broadcasters a long-sought victory by removing the “station cap,” or the FCC regulation that limits the number of U.S. TV stations that a single entity can own. The FCC is set to vote Aug.

sports.title: Russell proud of resilience after string of problems
sports.summary: Lewis Hamilton won the Belgian Grand Prix ahead of teammate George Russell, who recovered to finish third after a weekend plagued by electrical power issues. Russell cut his championship deficit from 66 to 25 points over the last three races but admitted more work is needed. Mercedes identified the problem before Hungary, where Russell aims to build on this progress.

sports.title: Wolves training cancelled after Arokodare refuses to leave pitch
sports.summary: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare’s training session was cancelled after he refused to leave the pitch. The incident follows Wolves rejecting a bid from Fiorentina while accepting an offer from Trabzonspor for the forward. Arokodare remains under contract and has reiterated his commitment to training professionally.

sports.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
sports.summary: Luka Modric, 40, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan. The Croatian midfielder, who turns 41 in September, will continue with the Serie A club after joining last summer. Milan finished fifth in Serie A last season and aims to bounce back under his leadership.

breaking.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
breaking.summary: President Donald Trump says Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel to secure a U.S. nuclear energy deal. The agreement, which bans uranium enrichment, hinges on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords. Saudi officials have not yet responded to the condition.

breaking.title: Modi Caught Off Guard as India’s Economic Failings Inflame Young People
breaking.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi was busy trying to put out other fires when a student movement suddenly exploded. There are no easy solutions to the problems behind it.

breaking.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings With Iraq
breaking.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

crisis.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
crisis.summary: Google and Tesla shares plunged sharply on Thursday after both companies reported negative free cash flow and massive AI spending plans. Alphabet’s stock fell over 7% while Tesla’s dropped 13.5% as investors question when returns will materialize. Major tech firms are racing to invest billions in AI, raising concerns over long-term financial sustainability.

crisis.title: Trump Prepares Yet Another Strategy to Resurrect Global Tariffs
crisis.summary: The administration’s 10 percent global tariffs are set to expire at midnight, but officials have been preparing replacements.

politics.title: Lobbying firm pressed for details about payments to journalists for favourable stories
politics.summary: A political lobbying firm, CT Group, is under fire for allegedly paying journalists for favourable stories, prompting calls for full disclosure and an overhaul of lobbying rules. The firm, co-founded by election strategist Lynton Crosby, faces condemnation from MPs, lobbyists and transparency campaigners. Critics warn the practice threatens journalism ethics and democracy.

politics.title: Israel Welcomes Trump’s Demand for Diplomatic Ties With Saudi Arabia
politics.summary: Israeli officials greeted the possibility of normalized ties, but analysts said the U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal nonetheless remained bad for Israel.

tech.title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
tech.summary: Tesla's robotaxi program is facing scrutiny as CEO Elon Musk reported flat mileage growth and a potential decline in the number of vehicles during an earnings call. Despite claims of 380,000 miles driven across six cities, concerns about safety and the program's future persist. As Tesla aims to expand its robotaxi service, the company must address these challenges to regain public confidence.

tech.title: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
tech.summary: Corsair’s Frame 4500X RS PC case is now $119.99, a $70 discount from its usual price. The mid-tower case supports EATX motherboards and GPUs up to 460mm with a panoramic glass front and side panel. Three ARGB-lit fans with reverse rotors pull in air while showcasing the case’s interior.

facts.title: BBC Inside Science
facts.summary: The U.S. military will begin screening personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, with those diagnosed offered voluntary hormone replacement therapy. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated this initiative aims to maintain a "healthy, capable, and decisively dominant fighting force." The program reflects ongoing efforts to enhance military readiness and performance among service members.

facts.title: NASA’s MAVEN Illuminates New Understanding of Auroras at Mars
facts.summary: NASA’s MAVEN mission revealed Mars experiences auroras formed by the same process that creates Earth’s northern and southern lights. Data shows the Dungey cycle, which drives auroras here, operates on Mars at smaller scales due to weaker magnetic fields. Scientists continue analyzing MAVEN’s final data to guide future Mars exploration.

facts.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
facts.summary: 1 min read HQ Web Team Jul 23, 2026 Image Article Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans transport the 130-foot-tall Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank out of a production cell inside the main factory building into a detached test building on a separate portion of the 829-acre site on May 15, 2026. The liquid hydrogen tank will form part of the core stage for the SLS (Space Launch System) rocket, providing thousands of gallons of super-cold propellant to one of four RS-25 engines.

health.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
health.summary: A new report reveals petrol pump thefts surged 40% in the UK last year, prompting calls for pre-payment systems. Thieves are exploiting unattended pumps, costing forecourt owners thousands weekly. Industry leaders will meet next month to discuss tighter security measures.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: Long-term exposure to road traffic noise is associated with a higher risk of Parkinson’s disease, the biggest study of its kind has found. Parkinson’s disease is a progressive disorder in which parts of the brain become damaged over time, affecting movement and balance. Existing research has found potential biological pathways that link noise exposure to Parkinson’s disease, largely due to stress responses and disrupted sleep. The researchers modelled noise exposure at the most and least exposed exterior of the residence of each participant and calculated the difference in noise levels.

health.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
health.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.
